TS÷TA¬TS÷RW¬TS÷CO¬PT÷TL¬PV÷Isi does it as Rayo roar back¬TE÷CO¬TS÷CO¬PT÷LI¬PV÷/newsfeed/U7BeaM04/¬TE÷CO¬TS÷CO¬PT÷IU¬PV÷https://livesport-ott-images.ssl.cdn.cra.cz/r300xfq60/0775e5be-6874-4e4c-970e-703c03c4d43f¬TE÷CO¬TS÷CO¬PT÷CIU¬PV÷https://livesport-ott-images.ssl.cdn.cra.cz/r740xfq60/0775e5be-6874-4e4c-970e-703c03c4d43f¬TE÷CO¬TS÷CO¬PT÷IPN¬PV÷AFP¬TE÷CO¬TS÷CO¬PT÷CO¬PV÷[p][b]Two goals in the final 10 minutes of regular time saw Rayo Vallecano flip the script in a 2-1 win over Osasuna at Vallecas, with the hosts stretching their unbeaten run to four straight La Liga games as they extended the gap from relegation yet further.[/b][/p]
[p]A rock-solid Rayo backline had breathed hope into their quest to remain in the Spanish top-flight, with the hosts having set a new club record after keeping three consecutive LaLiga clean sheets. But with just six points separating them from the dropzone ahead of the game, the home faithful will have been holding their collective breath when Osasuna’s Rubén García wonderfully plucked the ball out of the air in the penalty area after just seven minutes, only to strike straight at Stole Dimitrievski with the goal gaping.[/p]
[p]Despite their recent valiant defensive efforts, Rayo’s failure to score in successive league fixtures before this afternoon appeared to have affected their confidence on a sunny Madrid afternoon. A failure to gain control or even threaten the Osasuna net was eventually punished by their visitors, whose growing confidence saw Moi Gomez poke into the net from close-range after some delicious build-up play with García.[/p]
[p]Considering Osasuna’s comfortable position in mid-table and their recent dire run of form, Iñigo Peréz would have surely marked this game down for a potentially vital three points for his Rayo side. But the hosts’ failure to find an attacking spark continued into the second period with Sergio Herrera still barely troubled as the game approached the hour mark. A series of misplaced passes from the usually assured Isi Palazón summed up Rayo’s approach play in a frustrating affair.[/p]
[p]With the minutes ticking down, the visitors appeared comfortable holding out for a one-goal win in the face of mounting pressure, sitting back deep and maintaining their shape. Football is a funny game however, and there was precisely nothing that could have been done about a surprise Rayo comeback, courtesy of two thunderbolts in a thrilling finale. Firstly, Pep Chavarria smashed home from 25 yards after the ball had rolled out to him before Palazón’s solo run ended with another spectacular long-range finish to crush Osasuna hopes late on.[/p]

{"data":{"findNewsArticleById":{"__typename":"NewsArticle","id":"Cb2iKZz1","title":"A stat for each team after the Conference League quarter-final deciders as Rayo hold on","perex":"Four teams are left in the UEFA Conference League after a Thursday night filled with drama, with no side able to win both legs of their tie. Here is one stat for each team following the second legs.","content":"[p][b]19[/b] - [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/az-alkmaar/2RxOow1i/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"2RxOow1i\" target\u003d\"summary\"]AZ Alkmaar[/lslink-participant] were unable to do what they did in 2022/23 and reach the last four. [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/az-alkmaar-2RxOow1i/shakhtar-4ENWX2OA/?mid\u003ddYZxV0nC\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"dYZxV0nC\" target\u003d\"summary\"]The Dutch side drew 2-2[/lslink-event] against [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/shakhtar/4ENWX2OA/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"4ENWX2OA\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Shakhtar Donetsk[/lslink-participant], allowing the Ukrainians to progress 5-2 over the two legs. [i]De Kaasboeren [/i]were the last club from the Eredivisie in what was a tough year for Dutch football in continental play. AZ drew for the fourth time in 14 games against teams from Ukraine (6-4-4), with their goal tally in such clashes reaching 19.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"35535ecd-6a49-4a6c-9d95-22e407148e19\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2044848680851701993?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]9 [/b]- Shakhtar are back in the last four of a UEFA club competition, becoming the first team from Ukraine to get this far in the UECL. The Pitmen exact revenge for their elimination in the 2004/05 UEFA Cup round of 16, where they lost both games. Overall, they have stretched their unbeaten away streak to nine (6-3-0).[/p][p][b]42[/b] - Needing to come back from three goals after their first leg defeat, [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/aek/ANpZncAM/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"ANpZncAM\" target\u003d\"summary\"]AEK Athens[/lslink-participant] managed to do that against [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/rayo-vallecano/8bcjFy6O/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"8bcjFy6O\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Rayo Vallecano[/lslink-participant], levelling the tie by the 51st minute. However, [i]Dikefalos [/i]could not keep out their Spanish opponents, with [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/palazon-isaac/x2AuZhpr/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"x2AuZhpr\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Isaac Palazon[/lslink-player]\u0027s marker at the hour mark deciding the tie. AEK [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/aek-ANpZncAM/rayo-vallecano-8bcjFy6O/?mid\u003dvFf5G1XI\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"vFf5G1XI\" target\u003d\"summary\"]still won 3-1 on the night[/lslink-event], but fell 4-3 on aggregate. That goal they conceded was the 42nd against a LaLiga club, more than they have let in versus any other nation.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"e9432182-8d2f-46a7-b1b9-5e919f7f6f94\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2044885664878010575?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]4[/b] - After falling at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Cup at the beginning of the millennium, Rayo have managed to go (at least) one better. [i]Rayito [/i]kept their composure, managing to win the tie nine minutes after AEK restored parity. Their award is a maiden final four showing in a UEFA club competition. Rayo\u0027s away record may want to improve though for the semis, with their loss in Greece being the fourth the club has suffered in European play.[/p][p][b]33[/b] - [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/fiorentina/Q3A3IbXH/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"Q3A3IbXH\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Fiorentina[/lslink-participant]\u0027s Conference League journey has come to an end, earlier than ever. [i]La Viola [/i]could not overturn their 3-0 first leg loss in England against [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/crystal-palace/AovF1Mia/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"AovF1Mia\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Crystal Palace[/lslink-participant]. While they did end up [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/crystal-palace-AovF1Mia/fiorentina-Q3A3IbXH/?mid\u003dnTXCk4hM\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"nTXCk4hM\" target\u003d\"summary\"]winning 2-1 at the Stadio Artemio Franchi[/lslink-event], they bow out 4-2 on aggregate. The two-time finalists will not be in Europe next term, ending a four-year stay in the UECL. During that time, they managed 33 wins, more than any other team.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"18f118c3-10f3-47c5-bb1a-b3dd146dbe20\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2044886929393467423?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]3[/b] - Palace\u0027s debut season in European football could not have gone any better, with [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/glasner-oliver/CznGurCt/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"CznGurCt\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Oliver Glasner[/lslink-player]\u0027s side now qualifying for the semi-finals. [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/sarr-ismaila/ll2uTDkB/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"ll2uTDkB\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Ismaila Sarr[/lslink-player]\u0027s header 17 minutes in put the Eagles in a strong position. In the end, they held off their Italian opponents despite conceding twice. They are up against Shakhtar in the last four, another former European winner. Thursday\u0027s result was the third time they have lost in the UECL this term. They also mustered three shots on target in the return leg.[/p][p][b]0[/b] - The only team to overturn their first leg loss were [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/strasbourg/nP6UzIU1/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"nP6UzIU1\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Strasbourg[/lslink-participant], who got past [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/mainz/EuakNmc1/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"EuakNmc1\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Mainz[/lslink-participant] [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/mainz-EuakNmc1/strasbourg-nP6UzIU1/?mid\u003dGzdoKOGd\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"GzdoKOGd\" target\u003d\"summary\"]4-0 on the night[/lslink-event], winning 4-2 on aggregate. Multiple trophies are potentially in play for [i]Le Racing, [/i]who are also competing in the Coupe de France semis. Two goals in each half did the trick for them as they have qualified for a continental semi-final for the first time. In what was their third tie against a German team, Strasbourg have conceded zero goals at home in those matches.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"6df99925-9e07-4b82-8fdd-cfc864a6ab25\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2044883748592705846?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]17[/b] - What a disastrous turn of events for Mainz, who had a wonderful performance at home last week. Now, they are the ones on the wrong side of a big defeat, one that ultimately knocked them out of the Conference League. [i]Die Nullfunfer [/i]had just one attempt on target in the whole 90 minutes, which played a role in their UECL run coming to a close. Across their five European away losses all-time, they have conceded 17 times.[/p][p][b][lslink-league through.","content":"[p]The only time that [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/aek/ANpZncAM/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"ANpZncAM\" line with their first attack of the game, and it would be 10 minutes before the hosts had their first shot on target, a tame effort from [lslink-player looked to break at pace at every opportunity.[/p][p][b]Barça continued to probe for the opener, and, on 24 minutes, a lovely cross from a [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/cancelo-joao/dAyeWYpm/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"dAyeWYpm\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Joao Cancelo[/lslink-player] corner found [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/araujo-ronald/M3sbJix9/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"M3sbJix9\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Ronald Araújo[/lslink-player] at the far post, and his downward header gave the hosts the lead. [/b][/p][p]One almost quickly became two, but Batalla managed to push a rocket from Raphinha onto the crossbar as the hosts continued to threaten. Some scrappy play from both sides followed, and a series of free-kicks disrupted the flow of the game. Though Barça were still in the ascendancy as the half-time whistle was blown, they’d rarely looked like adding to Araújo’s opener.[/p][image alt\u003d\"Barcelona - Rayo Vallecano match momentum\" id\u003d\"bde8bb0b-47e3-4dbf-867a-6c6d1b5b102d\" credit-line\u003d\"Opta by StatsPerform\" guid\u003d\"843fb709-4100-4e8a-8e19-8baf1a21ed30\" original-width\u003d\"1080\" original-height\u003d\"1080\" /][p]Within three minutes of the restart, Rayo again beat the offside trap, though [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/perez-francisco/bePNNa1r/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"bePNNa1r\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Fran Perez[/lslink-player]’s cross could only find García’s gloves.[/p][p]As the hour mark approached, Barça stepped up the pace again, with a handful of half-chances going begging. Rayo were almost back on level terms when a fierce left-footed strike from Alvaro García was well saved from his namesake, and the goalkeeper then somehow diverted a header from [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/lopez-unai/dYFtDut6/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"dYFtDut6\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Unai Lopez[/lslink-player] away from danger whilst in mid-air. [/p][p]The lack of fluidity in Barca’s play drew loud whistles from the Camp Nou faithful, and when four Rayo players broke the lines again, the home support held their breath. {"data":{"findNewsArticleById":{"__typename":"NewsArticle","id":"jgyMmoB5","title":"One stat from each side after the Conference League quarter-final first legs","perex":"It was a night for the home teams in the UEFA Conference League quarter-finals. All four teams who hosted not only won, but kept clean sheets in their games, leaving them well poised for a place in the semi-finals. Flashscore looks at one stat for each of the eight teams involved in Thursday\u0027s action.","content":"[p][b]7 [/b]- [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/rayo-vallecano/8bcjFy6O/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"8bcjFy6O\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Rayo Vallecano[/lslink-participant] opened the night [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/aek-ANpZncAM/rayo-vallecano-8bcjFy6O/?mid\u003d61dcIN26\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"61dcIN26\" target\u003d\"summary\"]with a 3-0 defeat[/lslink-event] of [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/aek/ANpZncAM/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"ANpZncAM\" target\u003d\"summary\"]AEK Athens[/lslink-participant] in Madrid. [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/akhomach-ilias/ATAVnRY7/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"ATAVnRY7\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Ilias Akhomach[/lslink-player], [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/lopez-unai/dYFtDut6/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"dYFtDut6\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Unai Lopez[/lslink-player], and [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/palazon-isaac/x2AuZhpr/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"x2AuZhpr\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Isaac Palazon[/lslink-player] were the goalscorers for the Spaniards, who now have a firm foot in the last four. After suffering their first-ever home defeat in the round of 16, Rayo did not joke around this time, and left AEK with a mountain to climb.[/p][p]It was the seventh time that Los Franjirrojos kept a clean sheet in a home European match.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"686ad26d-e64f-4b32-9749-2e7261abd821\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2042313204731175357?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]12 [/b]- AEK will have to come up big in front of their fans next Thursday, having suffered their heaviest defeat in continental action since 2020/21.[/p][p]Their last four defeats in Europe have been by multiple goals, which is never a promising sign. If the Greeks are to prevail, they will have to beat a Spanish side for just the third time in what would be 20 games. Dikefalos suffered defeat against a LaLiga team for the 12th time.[/p][p][b]20[/b] - A strong showing from [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/crystal-palace/AovF1Mia/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"AovF1Mia\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Crystal Palace[/lslink-participant] saw them past [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/fiorentina/Q3A3IbXH/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"Q3A3IbXH\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Fiorentina[/lslink-participant] [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/crystal-palace-AovF1Mia/fiorentina-Q3A3IbXH/?mid\u003dv3U4iQN9\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"v3U4iQN9\" target\u003d\"summary\"]3-0 at Selhurst Park[/lslink-event]. Two goals in seven minutes during the first half sent the Eagles on their way, before a 90th-minute header from [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/sarr-ismaila/ll2uTDkB/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"ll2uTDkB\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Ismaila Sarr[/lslink-player] strengthened their position in the tie.[/p][p]It will now be a matter of whether they can put up a similar performance in Florence a week from now. That Sarr goal near the end brought Palace\u0027s tally to 20 in the Conference League this term.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"ae4c2628-3911-4b92-a5fc-f55550797ea8\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2042349383891501341?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]2[/b] - Fiorentina are in serious danger of having their earliest exit in the UECL ever. La Viola[i] [/i]will not be returning to the competition next season, and unless they go all the way this spring, they will not be in Europe at all. Perhaps a positive for them is the fact that they have already won three games in the tournament this term by three goals.[/p][p]Those all came on the road, though. The Tuscans rarely troubled Palace, having had just two shots on target in the match.[/p][p][b]10[/b] - [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/sano-kaishu/v13GHQFg/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"v13GHQFg\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Kaishu Sano[/lslink-player] and [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/posch-stefan/nsVWqZE2/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"nsVWqZE2\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Stefan Posch[/lslink-player] got the goals for [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/mainz/EuakNmc1/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"EuakNmc1\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Mainz[/lslink-participant] [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/mainz-EuakNmc1/strasbourg-nP6UzIU1/?mid\u003dAwgwMpnp\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"AwgwMpnp\" target\u003d\"summary\"]in their 2-0 success[/lslink-event] over the previously unbeaten [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/strasbourg/nP6UzIU1/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"nP6UzIU1\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Strasbourg[/lslink-participant]. Already enjoying their best run in a UEFA club competition, Die Nullfunfer[i] [/i]are on the cusp of becoming the first Bundesliga side in the semi-finals of the Conference League.[/p][p]They have not been as successful on the road, but they will have reason to believe they can hold on. Mainz picked up their 10th home win in European football all-time.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"7f3942ba-d887-419a-ac69-81f453a6a2bc\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2042348068851294346?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]3[/b] - An out-of-sorts Strasbourg are now facing some serious adversity in the UECL, something they have not really had to deal with throughout their run to this stage. [i]Le Racing [/i]had half the shots to the hosts, and just two attempts on target.[/p][p]In their four other game against teams from Germany, Strasbourg have never won by multiple goals. {"data":{"findNewsArticleById":{"__typename":"NewsArticle","id":"MkoPmAjC","title":"One stat for each of the UEFA Conference League teams after the round of 16 return legs","perex":"Thursday night saw the UEFA Conference League round of 16 conclude with thrilling matches across the continent. With the quarter-finalists now known, here is one stat for each club after the return legs.","content":"[h2]Favourites advance in the early games[/h2][p][b]2[/b] - [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/rakowski-kacper/txYQT0Im/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"txYQT0Im\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Rakow[/lslink-player] Czestochowa\u0027s European season is over as they [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/fiorentina-Q3A3IbXH/rakow-czestochowa-SQOrbYim/?mid\u003dWtyXmTVG\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"WtyXmTVG\" target\u003d\"summary\"]lost 2-1[/lslink-event] to [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/fiorentina/Q3A3IbXH/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"Q3A3IbXH\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Fiorentina[/lslink-participant] for the second week in a row. The Poles led at home, but conceded 22 minutes from time, forcing them to chase the tie. Unfortunately for them, [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/pongracic-marin/OSXlKkv9/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"OSXlKkv9\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Marin Pongracic[/lslink-player] scored with the last kick of the game to seal their fate. This result marked just the second time in European play in which Rakow scored at home but did not win. [/p][embed guid\u003d\"10dce382-cf8c-4a7c-a9fe-67cf63e051e1\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2034730484731613385?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]3[/b] - Fiorentina have made it a habit of going deep in the Conference League, as [i]La Viola [/i]are back in the last eight for the fourth year running. An Italian team have reached at least the semis of the tournament in each of its first four editions, something [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/vanoli-paolo/AB3WB3pA/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"AB3WB3pA\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Paolo Vanoli[/lslink-player]\u0027s men will look to achieve once more. Interestingly enough, [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/fiorelli-francesco/KMInUGRI/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"KMInUGRI\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Fiore[/lslink-player] have won both legs of a UECL knockout round tie for just the third time - the other two occasions coming three years ago.[/p][p][b]20 [/b]- Also progressing to the quarters are [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/mainz/EuakNmc1/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"EuakNmc1\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Mainz[/lslink-participant], who are enjoying their best-ever run in a UEFA club competition. The Germans knocked off [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/sigma-olomouc/drA4fSL4/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"drA4fSL4\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Sigma Olomouc[/lslink-participant] [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/mainz-EuakNmc1/sigma-olomouc-drA4fSL4/?mid\u003dWdFBOC25\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"WdFBOC25\" target\u003d\"summary\"]2-0 at home[/lslink-event], which also turned out to be the aggregate score. [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/posch-stefan/nsVWqZE2/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"nsVWqZE2\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Stefan Posch[/lslink-player] and [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/sieb-armindo/jyZ4c9ao/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"jyZ4c9ao\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Armindo Sieb[/lslink-player] were the goal scorers as the Czechs ended the match with 10 men. Mainz have now kept five clean sheets in Europe this term, something they also did 20 years ago in the UEFA Cup.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"cbd33fff-f082-43bd-91f7-f6c5516bdc3e\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2034727465109627072?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]10[/b] - Sigma\u0027s journey in Europe is over, and what an eventful run it was. From nearly being eliminated at the league phase to making the last 16, the Czech outfit experienced it all. However, that has all come to an end in what was their first defeat to a German side in a major European competition. They now have the task of trying to return to continental play through their domestic play. Their away form has not been great in Europe, though, as they have conceded in their last 10 road matches.[/p][p][b]28[/b] - [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/aek-larnaca/4lUZQCQq/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"4lUZQCQq\" target\u003d\"summary\"]AEK[/lslink-participant] Athens were one of three teams to advance to the last eight despite losing on the night. The Greeks were tested by a spirited [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/celje/SpbURe4O/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"SpbURe4O\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Celje[/lslink-participant] team, but [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/aek-ANpZncAM/celje-SpbURe4O/?mid\u003dp66CTbp2\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"p66CTbp2\" target\u003d\"summary\"]despite falling 2-0[/lslink-event] to the Slovenians at home, [i]Dikefalos [/i]advanced 4-2 across the two legs. They become the third club from their country to make the UECL quarter-finals. The last team that did so went all the way - something they will hope to mimic. AEK last reached a quarter-final in Europe 28 years ago in the UEFA Cup Winners Cup.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"47aa0a3f-2cdd-40da-a77a-d77ff615d67c\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2034726819165847750?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]5[/b] - Celje depart the continental scene one round earlier than last term, when they pulled off some stunning results to make it to the last eight. They can hold their heads high, going out with a solid performance and a victory. Historically, the Slovenian outfit have not had much success on their travels. That has changed in the 2025/26 campaign, where Thursday saw them collect their fifth road win in Europe.[/p][p][b]4[/b] - AEK Larnaca, who conceded just one during the league phase, could not keep up the unexpected results versus [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/crystal-palace/AovF1Mia/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"AovF1Mia\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Crystal Palace[/lslink-participant]. The Cypriots forced extra time at home, [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/aek-larnaca-4lUZQCQq/crystal-palace-AovF1Mia/?mid\u003dUgdaZTGN\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"UgdaZTGN\" target\u003d\"summary\"]where they succumbed 2-1[/lslink-event] to the heavily-favoured Eagles. It marked the second time that their UECL journey concludes at this stage, with [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/west-ham/Cxq57r8g/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"Cxq57r8g\" target\u003d\"summary\"]West Ham[/lslink-participant] knocking them out at this stage three years ago. The team from Larnaca have failed to win any of their four games at this stage of a UEFA club competition (0-1-3).[/p][embed guid\u003d\"f8295760-a433-4629-b145-79a7167279fc\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2034731077676552309?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]29[/b] - Palace had to huff and puff for that win, with most of the match being played in Larnaca\u0027s defensive third. In the end, [lslink-player cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/player/sarr-ismaila/ll2uTDkB/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" player-id\u003d\"ll2uTDkB\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Ismaila Sarr[/lslink-player]\u0027s goal in the ninth minute of extra time did the trick for the Londoners, who made the quarter-finals in their continental bow. It was a deserved win in the end for Palace, especially considering the fact that they had a whopping 29 shots in the 120 minutes of play.[/p][h2]Shakhtar, Rayo hold on[/h2][p][b]11[/b] - Just as they did at the beginning of the millennium, [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/rayo-vallecano/8bcjFy6O/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"8bcjFy6O\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Rayo Vallecano[/lslink-participant] are through to a European quarter-final. They did suffer a loss on the night, though, with [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/samsunspor/pSc6z7bf/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"pSc6z7bf\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Samsunspor[/lslink-participant] [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/rayo-vallecano-8bcjFy6O/samsunspor-pSc6z7bf/?mid\u003dWOgdSf3t\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"WOgdSf3t\" target\u003d\"summary\"]winning 1-0 in Madrid[/lslink-event]. But, [i]Los Franjirrojos [/i]prevailed 3-2 across the two legs. Rayo matched their UEFA Cup performance in 2000/01, when fellow Spanish side [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/alaves/hxt57t2q/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"hxt57t2q\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Deportivo Alaves[/lslink-participant] took them out in the last eight. A quarter century later, they are back. They did lose at home in Europe for the first time in their 11th match.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"98d8326c-3037-42dc-88e2-85716a6bb038\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2034758385841705419?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]6[/b] - Samsunspor\u0027s debut campaign in European football comes to an end, and what a run it has been for them. The Turkish side entered at the play-off round stage of the Europa League last August and departed having gotten past the league phase and the knockout round play-offs. They are in the running to qualify for Europe in the league once more, which could see them get a second crack next summer. [i]Kirmizi Simsekler [/i]kept a sixth clean sheet in their win.[/p][p][b]7[/b] - One of the sides left to have won a UEFA club competition, [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/shakhtar/4ENWX2OA/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"4ENWX2OA\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Shakhtar Donetsk[/lslink-participant], have managed to hold off [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/lech-poznan/OpNH7Ouf/\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" participant-id\u003d\"OpNH7Ouf\" target\u003d\"summary\"]Lech Poznan[/lslink-participant]. The PItmen [lslink-event cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/lech-poznan-OpNH7Ouf/shakhtar-4ENWX2OA/?mid\u003dhWZGiBWi\" sport-id\u003d\"1\" event-id\u003d\"hWZGiBWi\" target\u003d\"summary\"]fell 2-1 in Krakow[/lslink-event], but that was still enough for them to advance 4-3. It marks a sixth appearance in a continental quarter-final for Shakhtar, six years on from their last one. However, it is a second defeat to a Polish team, with the Ukrainians conceding seven times in those games.[/p][embed guid\u003d\"f9574167-aece-4b20-b5bd-4edccfbefb11\" url\u003d\"https://x.com/Conf_League/status/2034759307057660407?s\u003d20\" social-type\u003d\"twitter\" /][p][b]15[/b] - Lech were in the running to make a second showing in the last eight of the UECL. But they could not get a third goal to potentially send the match into extra time. [i]Kolejorz [/i]will instead be watching from home for the rest of the tournament, reflecting on what could have been. It was not without effort through. After all, Lech had 15 attempts in the whole match, five more than their opponents.[/p][p][b]16[/b] - Much more was expected from [lslink-participant cms-href\u003d\"https://www.flashscore.com/team/sparta-prague/6qA358jH/\" sport-id\u003d

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Sync Pixels</title>
</head>
<body>

<script>

    if (!String.prototype.replaceAll) {
        String.prototype.replaceAll = function(search, replace) {
            const escapedSearchValue = search.replace(/[.*+\-?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
            const regex = new RegExp(escapedSearchValue, 'g');
            return this.replace(regex, replace);
        };
    }

    var syncPixels = "";
    var syncIframes = "";

    var GDPR_APPLIES = "gdpr=";
    var GDPR = "gdpr_consent=";
    var US_PRIVACY = "us_privacy=";


    var params = location.search.substring(1);
    var consentString = "";
    var usPrivacy = "";
    var gdprAppliesValue = "1";

    try {

        var index = params.indexOf(GDPR);
        if (index >= 0) {
            consentString = params.substring(index + GDPR.length).split("&")[0];
        }

        index = params.indexOf(GDPR_APPLIES);
        if (index >= 0) {
            var tmp = params.substring(index + GDPR_APPLIES.length).split("&")[0];
            gdprAppliesValue = (tmp == null || tmp === "" || tmp === "1") ? "1" : "0";
        }

        index = params.indexOf(US_PRIVACY);
        if (index >= 0) {
            usPrivacy = params.substring(index + US_PRIVACY.length).split("&")[0];
        }

    } catch (e) {
        console.log("Can't detect gdpr consent string");
    }

    if (syncPixels) {

        var sync = syncPixels.split(" ");
        if (sync != null) {
            sync.forEach(function(url) {

                url = url.replaceAll("${GDPR}",gdprAppliesValue);
                url = url.replaceAll("${GDPR_STRING}", consentString);
                url = url.replaceAll("${US_PRIVACY}", usPrivacy);

                new Image().src = url;

            });
        }
    }

    if (syncIframes) {

        var syncF = syncIframes.split(",");
        if (syncF != null) {
            syncF.forEach(function(url) {

                url = url.replaceAll("${GDPR}",gdprAppliesValue);
                url = url.replaceAll("${GDPR_STRING}", consentString);
                url = url.replaceAll("${US_PRIVACY}", usPrivacy);

                var iframe = document.createElement("iframe");
                iframe.src = url;
                iframe.style.display = "none";
                iframe.style.width = "0px";
                iframe.style.height = "0px";
                document.body.appendChild(iframe);

            });
        }
    }

</script>

</body>
</html>
